title: picea webbiana
intro: Picea webbiana, also known as Bhutan spruce, is a species of coniferous tree native to the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Picea webbiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Picea webbiana can be found in traditional medicine, often in the form of essential oils, extracts, and infusions.
